title: Backrooms PBR texturepack
description: PBR Backrooms Textures best for BSL shaders
body: this texturepack adds PBR backrooms texturepacks use this with bloom ON i recommend using BSL shaders use the bloom for the glowing lights (ochre froglight) and the poolrooms tles are dark prismarine the lvl 0 floor is red wool and the lvl 0 walls are green wool the roof tiles for lvl 0 are quartz bricks
